summary: [ART-CHARTER] Approved: enzyme activity prediction; protein structure generation is a non-goal. Molecule generation, docking, and structure prediction are brainstorming-only, unapproved. [ART-DATA] Approved: EnzymeBench v3 snapshot EBV3-7A91; family-disjoint train/validation split. EnzymeBench v2 and temporary CSV export are deprecated, reproducibility-only, prohibited for formal runs. [ART-METRIC] Primary: macro AUROC; statistical unit: protein family; family-level formal evaluation. Accuracy, micro F1, per-protein averaging, and 0.75 threshold are exploratory-only. [ART-REJECTED-METRIC] Unapproved memo proposing accuracy and EnzymeBench v2 is rejected historical context. [ART-SEEDS] Formal: 7,21,42; 13 abandoned; report failed seeds. [ART-BASELINE] Frozen: ESM2-linear commit c0ffee; comparisons configuration-bound. [ART-GOVERNANCE] Approved: 24 GPU-hours, 2xA100; protect data/raw; stop on exhaustion or >2 NaN failures. Rejected: 80 GPU-hours, 8xH100, deleting failed runs.
